summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GitOracle GitHub search application. All backend APIs are fully functional and frontend UI components work correctly with proper integration.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 401 Unauthorized without GitHub token due to rate limiting
flaky_endpoints.impact: Code search functionality limited without authentication
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Add GitHub Personal Access Token in settings for higher rate limits

passed_tests: Homepage loading with hero section and search bar
Entity type tabs (All, Repos, Issues, PRs, Users, Code, Commits)
Settings modal with GitHub token management
Responsive design elements and UI positioning
Result cards for all entity types (repo, issue, user, code, commit)
Dark theme with Electric Amber (#FFB000) accents
Search result metadata display (stars, forks, languages, dates, authors)
